discovery.name: GMS_TEMPLATE
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT t.template_number AS TNUM, t.business_unit_id AS BUID, ou.name AS BUNAME FROM gms_award_templates_vl t JOIN hr_all_organization_units_vl ou ON ou.organization_id = t.business_unit_id WHERE t.business_unit_id IN (SELECT bu_id FROM gms_business_units WHERE contract_type_id IS NOT NULL) AND REGEXP_LIKE(t.template_number, '^[ -~]+$') AND NVL(t.budget_period_count,1) = 1 ORDER BY DECODE(ou.name,'University US Business Unit',0,1), t.template_number) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: GMS_SPONSOR
discovery.sql: SELECT NM FROM (SELECT party_name AS NM FROM gms_sponsors_v WHERE REGEXP_LIKE(party_name, '^[ -~]+$') ORDER BY DECODE(party_name,'National Science Foundation',0,'Department of Health and Human Services',1,2), party_name) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: GMS_PI
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT pp.person_number AS PNUM, pn.display_name AS NM, ea.email_address AS EM FROM gms_persons g JOIN per_all_people_f pp ON pp.person_id = g.person_id AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN pp.effective_start_date AND pp.effective_end_date JOIN per_person_names_f pn ON pn.person_id = pp.person_id AND pn.name_type = 'GLOBAL' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN pn.effective_start_date AND pn.effective_end_date JOIN per_email_addresses ea ON ea.person_id = pp.person_id AND ea.email_type = 'W1' WHERE g.eligible_pi = 'Y' AND ea.email_address LIKE '%oraclepdemos.com' AND REGEXP_LIKE(pn.display_name, '^[ -~]+$') AND REGEXP_LIKE(ea.email_address, '^[ -~]+$') ORDER BY pp.person_number) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: AWARD_DATES
discovery.sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE),'MM/DD/YYYY') AS SD, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE),12),'MM/DD/YYYY') AS ED FROM dual

base_read.sql: SELECT h.contract_number AS AWARD_NUMBER, h.id AS AWARD_ID FROM okc_k_headers_all_b h WHERE h.contract_number LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-AWD-%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT award_number AS AWARD_NUMBER, NVL(processed_message, 'PROCESSED_STATUS=' || NVL(processed_status,'(null)') || ' CODE=' || NVL(message_code,'(null)')) AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM gms_award_headers_int WHERE load_request_id = :LRID
